ModMetaData.name: Vacuum Resistance Thermobaric Patch
ModMetaData.author: rim542
ModMetaData.description: By default, More Injuries (Continued) treats all pawns equally when determining whether a blast causes lung collapse, regardless of whether they're wearing a fully sealed vacuum suit. This mod changes that. When a pawn is affected by a Bomb or Combat Extended thermobaric explosion, the chance of suffering a lung collapse is reduced according to the pawn's Vacuum Resistance stat from Odyssey. This allows vacuum-sealed armorto provide protection against the pressure-related lung injuries while leaving the rest of the explosion mechanics untouch
